HGSS.529.0000:
Welcome. This is Silph Co.’s
head office building.
HGSS.529.0001:
Hey, you! The elevator there is out of
order now.\f
Something is wrong with the electricity,
and it won’t work right.\f
I feel sorry that you wasted a trip,
so here is a gift for you!\f
HGSS.529.0002:
It’s Silph Co.’s latest product.
It’s not for sale anywhere yet.
HGSS.529.0003:
This elevator is out of order.\f
It may electrocute you. Stay away.
HGSS.529.0007:
Steven: We meet again!
Have you been to Hoenn before?\f
It’s such a beautiful place, with the
clearest ocean you can imagine.\f
You should visit sometime.\r
Hey!\f
Why don’t we trade Pokémon?\f
I’ve been looking for FORRETRESS.
I can trade my BELDUM for it. [0200,0000]
HGSS.529.0008:
Steven: Will you trade FORRETRESS
for my BELDUM? [0200,0000]
HGSS.529.0011:
Steven: Are you telling me that
you think that’s a FORRETRESS?
HGSS.529.0012:
Steven: You don’t see FORRETRESS in
the Hoenn region.\f
It’s my first time to actually see one.
Thank you so much!\f
Oh, look at the time. I really must go.\f
HGSS.529.0013:
Steven: This Pokémon seems to like
you a lot. Do you happen to like\r
Steel-type Pokémon?\f
I had a feeling.
That particular texture!\f
The cool and glowing bodies!
Such uniquenesses are only for\r
Steel-type Pokémon!\f
When it comes to the solitariness and
nobleness you sense through the \r
rugged body, which is almost rebuffing\r
when you hug, nothing comes close to\r
BELDUM, I must say...\f
In short, my METAGROSS is
truly strong and cool!\f
...
Oh, it seems that I got carried away.\f
It was a pleasure talking to you.
Bye!\f
HGSS.529.0014:
Hello...
You’re breaking up...\r
I think it depends on how my dad feels.\f
I see...
I’ll be on my way. See you soon.\f
HGSS.529.0015:
Steven: You are...
I remember your eyes.\f
When I see a Trainer whose eyes
twinkle, I always remember.\f
HGSS.529.0016:
Steven: You have a Pokédex!
So you are also in search of Pokémon.\r
Let me see...\f
I think I can help you with that.\f
Let’s say that you have stones in
front of you.\r
Which color would you pick? [0200,0000]
HGSS.529.0020:
Steven: You chose correctly!
I will give you [0100,0001,0000]!\f
HGSS.529.0022:
Steven: Take good care of it.
Your caring for it will make me\r
very happy.\f
HGSS.529.0023:
Steven: I see...
For the choice you’ve made,\r
I’d like to give you this Pokémon.\f
Except your party is full.\f
Why don’t you go to the PC to make
some room? I’ll be waiting here.
HGSS.529.0024:
Steven: I will ask again.
Which color do you choose? [0200,0000]
HGSS.529.0025:
Would you like to give a nickname
to [0100,0001,0000]? [0200,0000]
HGSS.529.0026: Steven: You did a great job naming it!\f
HGSS.529.0028:
Steven: You seem to be quite cautious.\f
Are you avoiding any chance when a
person might trick you?\r
You really are better than I thought.
